arts.ttl: Aston Villa XI vs Nottingham Forest – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa make the short trip to Nottingham Forest on Saturday evening with both sides aiming for Europe this season. Both sides are in the top six heading into the Premier League weekend, in what is set to be a fascinating encounter. arts.ttl: Unai Emery reiterates stance on Tyrone Mings as Aston Villa plan explained
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has reiterated his desire to start Pau Torres and Tyrone Mings in defence after the latter's impressive return from an ACL injury. "I would like to play with both players in the starting XI, but we have to build a structure and this will take time.

arts.ttl: Pundits all predict same score as 'lackadaisical' Aston Villa man slated ahead of Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Aston Villa go to the City Ground looking for their first away win at Nottingham Forest in five years and first in the top flight since January 1995 – when Dean Saunders was still banging them in. “Aston Villa have found some form again recently, but this is another test of their squad after a Champions League game in midweek, something they have struggled with previously.

arts.ttl: 'I'm watching': Unai Emery sees shades of another team in Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Lofty praise from the Aston Villa boss!

arts.ttl: Mings' mentality: Villa star on overcoming injury and Bruges error
arts.sum: When Tyrone Mings suffered an anterior cruciate ligament injury in the opening game of last season, nobody needed to tell him that it would be a long road back. Unfortunately, the Aston Villa and England defender has experienced it before. It was not pretty.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery lifts lid on change in Jhon Duran ‘behaviour’ amid Aston Villa goal spree
arts.sum: Unai Emery has praised Jhon Duran's change in behaviour at Aston Villa and claims the striker is now improving all aspects of his game. "Duran, we needed him in the second half in Leipzig, he played fantastically well.
